title: SQL: crash: select cast( 1 as varchar(10))
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.5);
SELECT CAST(value AS TEXT) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(1 AS TEXT) UNION SELECT CAST(2 AS TEXT);
key_bug_features: select cast with varchar type conversion
